summary: All features tested successfully. Access Denied page correctly shows 'Access Not Allocated' with current role for restricted routes. Bulk delete API works for Super Admin only with correct UI (checkboxes, Delete (N) button). WebSocket notification endpoints fixed (were using wrong auth dependency) and now work correctly. Notification bell visible with unread count badge.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1, -1) - existing issue, non-blocking

HTML nesting warning:
cannot be inside

in Platform Activity section - non-blocking

context_for_next_testing_agent: All three features tested: 1) Access Denied shows 'Access Not Allocated' correctly for restricted routes (Advertiser on /admin, Admin on /migration-matrix), 2) Bulk Delete API works (POST /api/admin/users/bulk-delete returns deleted_count), UI shows checkboxes+Delete(N) button for Super Admin only, 3) WebSocket notifications: /api/notifications/status works (had to fix auth dependency from get_current_user_ws to get_current_user), Notification bell shows popover with Live status.

access_denied_page.advertiser_on_admin: VERIFIED - Shows 'Access Not Allocated', current role 'Advertiser', requires 'admin panel' access
access_denied_page.admin_on_migration: VERIFIED - Shows 'Access Not Allocated', current role 'Admin', requires 'migration' access

bulk_delete.api_self_delete_prevention: VERIFIED - Returns 400 when trying to delete self
bulk_delete.ui_checkboxes_super_admin_only: VERIFIED - Checkboxes visible only for Super Admin
bulk_delete.ui_select_all_checkbox: VERIFIED - Present in table header for Super Admin
bulk_delete.ui_delete_button: VERIFIED - 'Delete (N)' button appears when users selected
bulk_delete.ui_row_highlighting: VERIFIED - Selected rows have blue highlight

websocket_notifications.status_users_list: VERIFIED - Super Admin sees connected users list
websocket_notifications.broadcast_endpoint: VERIFIED - POST /api/notifications/broadcast works for Super Admin
websocket_notifications.notification_bell: VERIFIED - Bell icon visible in sidebar with unread count badge
websocket_notifications.notification_panel: VERIFIED - Popover opens showing 'Live' status and notifications

bug_fix_applied.issue: REST endpoints /api/notifications/status and /api/notifications/broadcast were using get_current_user_ws (query param token) instead of get_current_user (header Authorization)
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed Depends(get_current_user_ws) to Depends(get_current_user) for both endpoints
